value.found_quote: Start with [`claude --safe-mode`](/en/cli-reference#cli-flags), which launches a session with all customizations disabled, including `CLAUDE.md`, skills, plugins, hooks, MCP servers, and custom commands and agents. Authentication, model selection, built-in tools, and permissions work normally. If the problem disappears in safe mode, one of those surfaces is the cause; use the targeted checks above to find which.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes `claude --safe-mode` as a CLI flag that launches a session with all customizations disabled. The purpose described on the page matches the claim: it is used to isolate whether a problem is caused by user configuration (if the problem disappears in safe mode, one of the customization surfaces is the cause). The page presents this as a current, available feature with no deprecation or preview notices.
